description: End-to-end validation execution gate -- the capstone objective. Executes test plans from OBJ-077 against all tuned geometries (via OBJ-067), validated transitions (via OBJ-068), the full asset orchestration pipeline (OBJ-057), and audio sync (OBJ-038). This is the actual SC-01/SC-03/SC-05/SC-06/SC-07 gate. The project is production-ready when this objective passes.
notes: Tier 6 validation gate. Added per Round 2 Issue 3. The capstone -- everything must work together. Fixed deps per Round 4 Issue C.
